positive: A whimsical and stylized forest creature, resembling a mythical woodland fox mix, seated alertly among stylized glowing mushrooms and bioluminescent ferns. The creature should have a graceful, elongated silhouette, a vibrant coral and deep sapphire fur texture, and large, expressive, stylized eyes. The composition must be central, with the creature dominating the foreground against a stylized, deep emerald and midnight blue background. Focus on clean lines, bold silhouettes, high contrast between the bright glowing flora and the dark background. Vector art style, clean print-on-demand aesthetic, flat colors with digital glow effects, symmetrical balance, highly detailed, suitable for screen printing, octane render, minimalist fantasy art.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, logo, low quality, noise, artifacts, dirty, smudged, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, real life, messy, grayscale
